overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded character in ancient Egyptian armor exploring a temple complex at dusk. The character ascends a ceremonial staircase, walks through colonnades with hieroglyphic carvings, circles a large monument, and approaches a pyramid.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed ceremonial staircase with hieroglyphic walls

agents.ego_description: walking up wide stone stairs between decorated walls toward the terrace above

entered.detail: wide worn stone steps ascending between walls
stone wall carved with ancient Egyptian hieroglyphs and figures
stone wall carved with ancient Egyptian hieroglyphs and figures

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a ceremonial stone staircase enclosed by high walls covered in detailed hieroglyphic carvings. The space is narrow and sheltered, with no sky visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open temple terrace with stone colonnade

events.description: character emerges from enclosed stairwell onto open terrace with full sky visibility

agents.ego_description: walking across the open stone terrace toward the colonnade entrance

entered.detail: broad flat stone pavement with large tiles
tall stone columns with detailed hieroglyphic carvings
massive pyramid visible on the horizon against the dusk sky

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the open terrace, the character walks across broad stone pavement toward a colonnade of hieroglyphic columns. The sky opens up to reveal a dusky blue-purple atmosphere with a distant pyramid visible on the left horizon.

events.description: character begins circling the large central statue to examine it from different angles

agents.ego_description: circling the monumental statue and examining the hieroglyphic columns and offerings

entered.detail: large dark bronze statue of a seated pharaoh on a bovine creature base
ceremonial bowls with offerings placed at the statue base

segments.scene_description: The character enters the covered colonnade and circles a massive dark statue of a seated figure on a bovine creature, surrounded by offering bowls and towering hieroglyphic columns. The space is semi-covered with partial sky visible through the roof openings.

events.description: character exits the colonnade and walks along the pyramid enclosure wall
character stops and turns to face back toward the temple colonnade

agents.ego_description: walking along the pyramid enclosure wall and approaching the pyramid base before turning back

entered.detail: decorated stone wall with hieroglyphic friezes running along the pyramid complex
palm tree growing near the pyramid base

segments.scene_description: Leaving the colonnade, the character walks along the enclosure wall with the massive pyramid now dominating the left side of the frame. The character approaches the pyramid base, passes a palm tree, and turns to look back at the temple colonnade as the light fades.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered depths of a temple interior out into a vast, open Egyptian landscape at dusk. It begins with the character ascending a narrow ceremonial stone staircase enclosed by high walls of detailed hieroglyphics, where the sky remains hidden. As the character emerges onto a broad stone terrace, the environment opens up to reveal a dusky blue-purple atmosphere and a distant pyramid on the horizon. The scene then shifts into a semi-covered colonnade, circling a massive dark statue of a seated figure on a bovine creature amidst offering bowls and towering pillars. Finally, the camera leaves the shelter of the columns to follow the character along an enclosure wall, passing a palm tree as the massive pyramid dominates the frame and the light fades.
